Martin & Co.
One model end to end — build recipes, plan the week, run a resource-constrained cook schedule, inspect ingredient transitions, keep a lot-based inventory with storage capacity, drive a shopping list, track waste, and tally nutrition.
integrated prototype · v2.0 · external data packs
Single shared engine: catalog with quantity profiles, keep-life (prep + opened clocks), prep-class affordances incl. deskin, cook method/crust, recipe synthesis, lot inventory with litre-capacity, plan-driven shopping with best-fit packs and leftover routing, waste, and macro nutrition. Quantities, pack sizes, volumes, keep-lives and macros are seeded regional estimates — calibrate before trusting; keep-lives are food-safety-adjacent, verify with a regional authority.
